description: Style Note puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. This pair is great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style. Product Description Round toed Sports shoe with a mesh upper and synthetic overlays Padded interiors with reinforced overlay and a pull loop at the heal collar Form stripes on one side, with symmetric design TPU outsole with an upraised and decoupled heel, has honeycomb nubs at the forefoot region and is arched at the midfoot Material and Care Mesh, synthetic Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
